records.question: Which highschoolers named Jessica are currently in grade 11?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT highschooler.id FROM highschooler
WHERE highschooler.name = 'Jessica' AND highschooler.grade = 11
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM Highschooler WHERE name = 'Jessica' AND grade = 11

records.question: Who are the highschoolers named Gabriel in grade 9 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT highschooler.id FROM highschooler
WHERE highschooler.name = 'Gabriel' AND highschooler.grade >= 9
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM Highschooler WHERE name = 'Gabriel' AND grade >= 9
